extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN Fabio won Stage 4 sprint in photo finish after CAVAGNA's 1.5km solo attack disrupted rival leadouts
tactical_patterns: CAVAGNA attacked 1.5km out forcing rival teams to chase, disorganizing sprint trains before Quick-Step reset their leadout
BENNETT lost four positions after Quick-Step disruption forced him to ride without teammates in final kilometer
Quick-Step switched back to JAKOBSEN after CAVAGNA caught, showing tactical flexibility after previous day's mistake made them sharper

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: finished second after recovering from disorganized position without teammates, shows ability to freestyle sprint
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: neutral: holds red jersey by 2 seconds over QUINTANA but commentary doubts he survives tomorrow's summit finish
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: negative: crashed after teammate wheel touch, showed frustration suggesting team positioning issues
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: Quick-Step delivered sprint victory after learning from previous stage mistake, team responds well to adversity
